R Notebook

pnorm(166, mean = 160, 6)
[1] 0.8413447
# the probability of x
qnorm (0.8413447, mean = 160, 6)
[1] 166
dnorm (166, 160, 6)
[1] 0.04032845
pnorm(166.05, 160, 6)- pnorm(165.95, 160, 6)
[1] 0.004032845
# check normality

x_1 <- rnorm (100, 170, 7)
hist(x_1)

qqnorm(x_1)
qqline(x_1)

# for test

shapiro.test(x_1)

    Shapiro-Wilk normality test

data:  x_1
W = 0.9882, p-value = 0.523
# Mean points plot
x1 <- rnorm(25,170,7)
sd(x1)
[1] 5.120424
se1 <- sd(x1)/sqrt(25)
se1
[1] 1.024085
x2 <- rnorm(50,170,7)
sd(x2)
[1] 8.251453
se2 <- sd(x2)/sqrt(50)
se2
[1] 1.166932
x2 <- rnorm(75,170,7)
sd(x2)
[1] 7.352713
x4 <- rnorm(150,170,7)
sd(x4)
[1] 7.153437
x5 <- rnorm(500,170,7)
sd(x5)
[1] 7.074026
x6 <- rnorm(600,170,7)
sd(x6)
[1] 7.351887
# lambda = 5
rpois(50, 5)
 [1]  7  4  9  2  4  3  4  3  5  4  5  5  4  2  3  5  7 10  2  3  5  6  5  4  2  9 10  4  4  5  6  2  3  5  6  3  6  4  7  3  5  3  9  8  5  7  5  7  3  4
# replicate - will have vector of means
mean(rpois(50,5))
[1] 5.16
rpois_vector_mean <- replicate(100, mean(rpois(50,5)))
rpois_vector_mean
hist(rpois_vector_mean)

qqnorm(rpois_vector_mean)
qqline(rpois_vector_mean)

shapiro.test(rpois_vector_mean)

    Shapiro-Wilk normality test

data:  rpois_vector_mean
W = 0.99307, p-value = 0.8921
runif <- runif(rpois_vector_mean)
hist(runif)
